name_en: In stock 25s hobo, really love it, one bag three ways
name_cn:
In stock 25s hobo, really love it, one bag three ways
Medium size, very lazy chic! Pull the strap tight to instantly become a backpack 🎒, loosen the strap to become a single-strap hobo. The flexible strap design is amazing. The front features a simple and elegant large diamond quilt. Dual metal chains and dual-C adjustable buckles on both sides. Calfskin is soft, delicate, easy to maintain! The strap is adjustable for DIY styles: underarm hobo, backpack, shoulder bag, or handbag....
size:20*31*8.5cm 99471 Medium
